Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 61 

W = Other Managed Care encounter 

X = Non-Medicaid/CHIP service tracking claims 

Y = Other supplemental payment 

Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: Some claim types are for service tracking claims (notably, those where CLM_TYPE_CD = 4, D or X), 
which do not indicate a service for an individual (e.g., they may be used for lump sum payments such 
as those
